news.title:
Indian equities surged 1.5%+ on April 1; Nifty 50 rose 1.56%, Sensex up 1.65%.
Defence stocks like GRSE, Mazagon Dock, and Cochin Shipyard gained; PSU banks rallied.
news.summary:
Indian equities surged 1.5%+ on April 1; Nifty 50 rose 1.56%, Sensex up 1.65%.
Defence stocks like GRSE, Mazagon Dock, and Cochin Shipyard gained; PSU banks rallied.

news.title:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders saw an NSE block trade of 130,736 shares.
The trade was valued at Rs. 30.8 crores, priced at Rs. 2354 per share.
news.summary:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders saw an NSE block trade of 130,736 shares.
The trade was valued at Rs. 30.8 crores, priced at Rs. 2354 per share.

news.title:
Defence index surged 7%, led by GRSE (+19%), Cochin Shipyard (+15%), and Mazagon Dock (+13.5%). BEL secured ₹6,795 crore contracts.
GRSE FY26 revenue grew 26% YoY; Midhani reported 12.3% YoY growth. Analysts favor BEL, Midhani, and Solar Industries for strong execution.
news.summary:
Defence index surged 7%, led by GRSE (+19%), Cochin Shipyard (+15%), and Mazagon Dock (+13.5%). BEL secured ₹6,795 crore contracts.
GRSE FY26 revenue grew 26% YoY; Midhani reported 12.3% YoY growth. Analysts favor BEL, Midhani, and Solar Industries for strong execution.

news.title:
Mid, smallcap indices rebounded sharply; Nifty Midcap 100 rose 3.1%, Smallcap 100 up 3.5%.
Muthoot Finance surged 14%, GRSE jumped 18%, while crude prices and US bond yields declined.
news.summary:
Mid, smallcap indices rebounded sharply; Nifty Midcap 100 rose 3.1%, Smallcap 100 up 3.5%.
Muthoot Finance surged 14%, GRSE jumped 18%, while crude prices and US bond yields declined.

news.title:
GRSE, Mazagon Dock, Cochin Shipyard shares surged up to 20% on April 1; GRSE reported record turnover of ₹6,400 crore in FY26.
Cochin Shipyard's inclusion in F&O from April 1 and Mazagon Dock's steady performance also boosted stock activity significantly.
news.summary:
GRSE, Mazagon Dock, Cochin Shipyard shares surged up to 20% on April 1; GRSE reported record turnover of ₹6,400 crore in FY26.
Cochin Shipyard's inclusion in F&O from April 1 and Mazagon Dock's steady performance also boosted stock activity significantly.

news.title:
GRSE reports record turnover for FY26, highlighting strong financial performance.
The update appears to be a press release, lacking in-depth analysis or commentary.
news.summary:
GRSE reports record turnover for FY26, highlighting strong financial performance.

news.title:
Garden Reach achieves record FY26 turnover of ₹6,400 cr, up from ₹5,076 cr in FY25.
Interim dividend rises to ₹129 from ₹89.5; delivered 8 vessels, incl. advanced frigates.
news.summary:
Garden Reach achieves record FY26 turnover of ₹6,400 cr, up from ₹5,076 cr in FY25.
Interim dividend rises to ₹129 from ₹89.5; delivered 8 vessels, incl. advanced frigates.

news.title:
GRSE achieves a record Rs 6,400 crore turnover, showcasing robust performance.
The company delivered eight vessels to the Indian Navy, reinforcing its capabilities.
news.summary:
GRSE achieves a record Rs 6,400 crore turnover, showcasing robust performance.
The company delivered eight vessels to the Indian Navy, reinforcing its capabilities.

news.title:
Defence stocks like BEL, HAL, and Garden Reach surge post ₹2.38L crore DAC approvals.
Approvals boost FY23 defence budget to ₹6.73L cr; triple last year's ₹2.2L cr.
news.summary:
Defence stocks like BEL, HAL, and Garden Reach surge post ₹2.38L crore DAC approvals.
Approvals boost FY23 defence budget to ₹6.73L cr; triple last year's ₹2.2L cr.

news.title:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders appoints Cmde Indrajit Dasgupta as Executive Director w.e.f. 25 Mar 2026.
Earlier intimation had an incorrect date; all other details remain unchanged per Regulation 30.
news.summary:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders appoints Cmde Indrajit Dasgupta as Executive Director w.e.f. 25 Mar 2026.
Earlier intimation had an incorrect date; all other details remain unchanged per Regulation 30.

news.title:
Nifty India Defence index fell 5% amid market sell-off; HAL hit 52-week low at ₹3,510.
Defence stocks, including GRSE, BDL, and Mazagon Dock, plunged 6-8%; profit booking weighs.
news.summary:
Nifty India Defence index fell 5% amid market sell-off; HAL hit 52-week low at ₹3,510.
Defence stocks, including GRSE, BDL, and Mazagon Dock, plunged 6-8%; profit booking weighs.

news.title:
Defence stocks like HAL, BEL, BDL, and GRSE show stellar returns of up to 1750% over four years.
Experts view defence as India's new IT sector, driven by geopolitical tensions, govt push, and export growth.
news.summary:
Defence stocks like HAL, BEL, BDL, and GRSE show stellar returns of up to 1750% over four years.
Experts view defence as India's new IT sector, driven by geopolitical tensions, govt push, and export growth.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai platform, boosting automotive software; stock rises 2% to ₹4,490.
GRSE & Bharat Forge sign MoU for defence manufacturing; GRSE stock jumps 6% to ₹2,548 on NSE.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai platform, boosting automotive software; stock rises 2% to ₹4,490.
GRSE & Bharat Forge sign MoU for defence manufacturing; GRSE stock jumps 6% to ₹2,548 on NSE.

news.title:
GRSE, Cochin Shipyard & Mazagon Dock shares gain up to 18% in 2 days.
Despite broader market sell-off amid Middle East tensions, GRSE climbed 9%.
news.summary:
GRSE, Cochin Shipyard & Mazagon Dock shares gain up to 18% in 2 days.
Despite broader market sell-off amid Middle East tensions, GRSE climbed 9%.

news.title: Garden Reach Shipbuilders signed an MoU with Bharat Forge's subsidiary for defense and maritime innovation.
news.summary: Garden Reach Shipbuilders signed an MoU with Bharat Forge's subsidiary for defense and maritime innovation.

news.title:
GRSE signed MoU with KSSL to develop indigenous naval systems, enhancing maritime defence technologies.
GRSE shares rose 4.1% to ₹2407.55 on BSE as collaboration aims to boost self-reliance in defence tech.
news.summary:
GRSE signed MoU with KSSL to develop indigenous naval systems, enhancing maritime defence technologies.
GRSE shares rose 4.1% to ₹2407.55 on BSE as collaboration aims to boost self-reliance in defence tech.

news.title:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders partners with Kalyani Strategic Systems for advanced naval systems.
Collaboration targets defense manufacturing for local and international markets.
news.summary:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders partners with Kalyani Strategic Systems for advanced naval systems.
Collaboration targets defense manufacturing for local and international markets.

news.title:
India's defence budget of ₹7.85 lakh crore boosts sector visibility; Mazagon Dock and Garden Reach hold robust order books.
Mazagon Dock specializes in submarines/warships; Garden Reach focuses on advanced patrol vessels and shows strong execution momentum.
news.summary:
India's defence budget of ₹7.85 lakh crore boosts sector visibility; Mazagon Dock and Garden Reach hold robust order books.
Mazagon Dock specializes in submarines/warships; Garden Reach focuses on advanced patrol vessels and shows strong execution momentum.

news.title: Elara Capital upgrades GRSE from Sell to Reduce, raising target to ₹2,300 from ₹2,030.
news.summary: Elara Capital upgrades GRSE from Sell to Reduce, raising target to ₹2,300 from ₹2,030.

news.title:
HAL, Mazagon Dock, GRSE see order visibility due to defence demand, aircraft replacement.
India may need 200-400 aircraft in 7-15 years; HAL, GRSE, Mazagon Dock to benefit.
news.summary:
HAL, Mazagon Dock, GRSE see order visibility due to defence demand, aircraft replacement.
